claim: Blocking ICL on succinate eliminates false glyoxylate shunt flux and matches 13C-MFA
evidence_detail: Zero glyoxylate shunt flux on succinate in 13C flux map; succinate goes through TCA to acetyl-CoA via PDH/POR
alternative_explanation: pFBA artifact: glyoxylate shunt is slightly more flux-efficient than full TCA for generating acetyl-CoA from succinate
failure_test: If ICL is needed on succinate, blocking it should cause >5% growth reduction
regression_check: Growth reduction only 0.28%; all other tests still pass (12/12)

claim: H2 yields are 10-22x over-predicted when maximizing H2 at 80% growth
evidence_detail: Experimental yields: fumarate 18, succinate 23, acetate 21, butyrate 41 mol H2/100 mol C
alternative_explanation: Model lacks proper electron transport regulation between growth and H2; photon cap exists but electron partitioning is unconstrained
failure_test: If ATP/electron constraints are added, H2 yield should decrease toward experimental range
scope: All substrates under NifA* H2-producing conditions
regression_check: No model edit made; diagnostic only

claim: Model already has photon uptake cap at 36.6 units
ATP synthase (rxn08173_c0) has no upper bound (0 to 1000)
evidence_detail: pFBA shows ATP synthase flux = 58.46 at baseline
alternative_explanation: Chowdhury 2022 provides substrate-specific ATP caps (54.0/45.7/56.7/85.4 mmol/gDW/day)
failure_test: Adding ATP cap should reduce H2 over-prediction
regression_check: Need to verify growth is still feasible with ATP cap
